name: Equibles
desc: An open-source, self-hosted mini Bloomberg Terminal for AI agents — SEC filings, institutional holdings, insider trading, congressional trades, and short data from a single self-hosted stack.

name: OpenCLI
desc: Make Any Website into CLI & Use your logged-in browser by AI agent.

name: agent-governance-toolkit
desc: AI Agent Governance Toolkit — Policy enforcement, zero-trust identity, execution sandboxing, and reliability engineering for autonomous AI agents. Covers 10/10 OWASP Agentic Top 10.

name: amazing-sandbox
desc: Amazing Sandbox  - run third-party tools and AI agents securely on your machine

name: notebooklm-py
desc: Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.

name: ruflo
desc: 🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features    enterprise-grade architecture, self-learning swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

name: Kunlun-M
desc: KunLun-M — Open-source static code analysis for PHP, JavaScript, Java, with AST-based semantic scanning and one-click AI Agent integration (OpenClaw, Codex, Claude Code, Hermes, and more).

name: cube-pets-office
desc: AI Agent OS with visible workflow, real execution, and a 3D office shell. From one sentence to full task lifecycle — plan, run, review, replay.

name: OpenViking
desc: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

name: mnem
desc: Git for AI Agent Knowledge. A persistent, versioned memory layer for AI systems. Hybrid GraphRAG retrieval. Runs entirely offline.
